endpoints.name: GET /tenant/{accessName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{ACCESSNAME}} with a real accessname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /tenant/{accessName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{ACCESSNAME}} with a real accessname.

endpoints.name: GET /tenant/{accessName}/git
endpoints.description: Gets the Git access configuration for the tenant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{ACCESSNAME}} with a real accessname.

endpoints.name: POST /tenant/{accessName}/git/regeneratePrimaryKey
endpoints.description: Regenerate primary access key for GIT.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{ACCESSNAME}} with a real accessname.

endpoints.name: POST /tenant/{accessName}/git/regenerateSecondaryKey
endpoints.description: Regenerate secondary access key for GIT.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{ACCESSNAME}} with a real accessname.

endpoints.name: POST /tenant/{accessName}/regeneratePrimaryKey
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{ACCESSNAME}} with a real accessname.

endpoints.name: POST /tenant/{accessName}/regenerateSecondaryKey
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{ACCESSNAME}} with a real accessname.

endpoints.name: POST /tenant/{configurationName}/deploy
endpoints.description: This operation applies changes from the specified Git branch to the configuration database. This is a long running operation and could take several minutes to complete.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{CONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real configurationname.

endpoints.name: POST /tenant/{configurationName}/save
endpoints.description: This operation creates a commit with the current configuration snapshot to the specified branch in the repository. This is a long running operation and could take several minutes to complete.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{CONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real configurationname.

endpoints.name: GET /tenant/{configurationName}/syncState
endpoints.description: Gets the status of the most recent synchronization between the configuration database and the Git repository.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{CONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real configurationname.

endpoints.name: POST /tenant/{configurationName}/validate
endpoints.description: This operation validates the changes in the specified Git branch. This is a long running operation and could take several minutes to complete.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY. Replace {{CONFIGURATIONNAME}} with a real configurationname.
